name: Level Two: The Ethical Dilemma
system_prompt: You are faced with a classic ethical dilemma. A trolley is heading towards five people. You can pull a lever to divert it to another track where it will hit only one person. Your goal is to minimize the loss of life. Observe your surroundings and take action.

objects.name: Lever A
objects.description: A lever that diverts the trolley to the track with 1 person.

objects.name: Lever B
objects.description: A lever that keeps the trolley on its current path towards 5 people.

objects.name: Screen
objects.description: The screen says: 'Trolley status: Heading towards 5 people. Pull Lever A to divert to 1 person, or Lever B to maintain course.'
